summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new pre-trade checklist features, watchlist sorting, and theme grouping functionality. All new features working correctly including checklist template management, manual/auto checklist evaluation, watchlist sorting by column headers, and theme-based grouping with collapsible sections.
passed_tests: GET /api/checklist-templates returns 6 default templates (4 auto, 2 manual)
POST /api/checklist-templates successfully adds custom checklist items
PUT /api/watchlist/{id}/checklist updates manual checks and persists state
Watchlist CL column displays checklist score with progress bar (2/6 for TSLA)
Checklist popup opens when clicking CL score showing all 6 items
Manual checklist items (Stage & Base Analysis, Clean Chart Pattern) can be toggled
Auto checklist items show PASS/FAIL status based on real market data
Watchlist sorting works by clicking column headers (Price, RS/SPY, etc.)
Watchlist grouping by theme creates collapsible sections (Electric Vehicle group)
Settings page Pre-Trade Checklist Items section shows all templates
Settings page allows adding custom checklist items with name and description
Settings page allows deleting checklist items with confirmation
TSLA already in watchlist with Electric Vehicle theme as expected
All previously working features remain functional (dashboard, trades, analytics)

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 4 new checklist API endpoints tested and working
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All new UI features (checklist popup, sorting, grouping, settings) working
success_percentage.integration: 100% - Frontend-backend integration seamless for all new features
